title: TEPALIT Digital Companion: Theological Taxonomy and Hymn-Pair Dossier for the Lutheranisation Thesis
description:
Open digital companion to the monograph chapter Dogmatická komparácia luteranizmu a českých konfesií (utrakvizmus, Jednota bratská) v zrkadle liturgických a hymnologických prameňov (16.–18. storočie), produced under the APVV-24-0484 (TEPALIT) grant.

The dataset comprises a four-layer theological taxonomy released as versioned CSV files: (1) 4 loci × 5 sub-loci hierarchy (LA / SK / EN), (2) attested confessional positions per tradition per locus, (3) tagged hymnic-liturgical evidence with epistemic classification, and (4) case-study hymn-pair dossiers for the Lutheranisation thesis. The companion website includes a parallel-text viewer (Synoptikon), an intertextual network graph, an interactive timeline, and a bilingual (Slovak/English) hymn-pair register.

Distinguished by a three-axis epistemic transparency framework: (a) epistemic status — type of claim; (b) evidentiary strength — quality of textual evidence; (c) verification status — whether project members have personally collated primary witnesses. Pairs flagged as conjectural or unverified are visibly marked, never displayed as established fact.

This work was supported by the Slovak Research and Development Agency under the Contract no. APVV-24-0484.

creators.name: Valčo, Michal
creators.affiliation: Evangelical Theological Faculty, Comenius University in Bratislava

notes: This work was supported by the Slovak Research and Development Agency under the Contract no. APVV-24-0484. The version-0.1.0 dataset comprises 5 FACTUAL/INTERPRETIVE hymn-pair dossiers + 1 DEFERRED research-target manifest. Two pairs are VERIFIED (Sources/Verification_PAIR_004.md, Sources/Verification_PAIR_006.md): PAIR_004 (BA→CS continuity of 'Otče Nebeský Bože' per Grešová-Sekelská 2023's critical edition + Benka 2024); PAIR_006 (intra-codex Eucharistic stratification of AC 1581 → BA 1585 per Benka 2024 critical edition). Three pairs are PRIMARY_PENDING or below: PAIR_001 (SECONDARY_ONLY, awaiting Baťová 2011 acquisition), PAIR_005 (PRIMARY_PENDING, awaiting CS facsimile lookup since Neyswětegsij is not in Grešová-Sekelská 2023's 8-hymn critical edition), PAIR_002 (CONJECTURED working hypothesis, transparently flagged). PAIR_003 is the DEFERRED 34-hymn BA→CS target manifest.
